meta.title: Greenways content modules
meta.description: Independent HTML/video illustrations agents open in the shared modal shell — each row includes what-it-is (description) and how-to-use (usageHint).

modules.title: Sustainability map
modules.description: 514 case studies + 391 directory organisations — interactive map with savings stats.
modules.usageHint: Filter by sector or topic, jump to a city, and click markers for case studies and verified savings examples.

modules.title: Eco project planner
modules.description: Home, Restaurant, and Office journey examples — scales and planning paths for upgrades.
modules.usageHint: Pick your building type, follow the journey steps, and note timing before you apply for grants or finance.

modules.title: Energy prices ticker
modules.description: Live wholesale €/MWh lanes — same feed as the Greenways buildings dashboard.
modules.usageHint: Read the moving price bands for context, then pair with tariff compare or a savings projection before you finance an upgrade.

default.label: Why watch wholesale prices?
default.body: Wholesale €/MWh moves eventually flow into retail energy bills. When unit costs rise, the same site spends more even if usage stays flat. Pair this ticker with a savings trajectory so you can plan upgrades and tariff reviews before the next price jump.

finance.label: Vincent — prices, bills, and planning ahead
finance.body: Wholesale €/MWh is the early signal for what restaurants and sites pay on supply contracts. When lanes move up, every inefficient hour on kitchens, HVAC, or refrigeration costs more — even before your tariff formally renews. I use this ticker with clients to time ETL upgrades, BNPL, and green loans. Open the savings trajectory next: it shows where usage is heading so you can counter price rises instead of reacting after the bill lands.

media.label: Cheryce — context for sustainability news
media.body: Energy headlines make more sense when you can see wholesale lanes moving in real time. Price shifts explain why policy and market stories eventually hit operator budgets — not just emissions targets. I pair the ticker with case studies on the map and the savings trajectory when a site needs a forward-looking story, not just today's spot price.

grants.label: Andrieus — fund before the bill spike
grants.body: When wholesale prices climb, grants and subsidies matter more because they shrink the net capex on efficient kit. Watch the ticker to spot when bills are under pressure, then stack non-repayable support with verified ETL products. The savings trajectory helps you show assessors a planned path — not a panic upgrade after costs jump.

equipment.label: Artemis — upgrade timing vs unit costs
equipment.body: Rising €/MWh magnifies every inefficient oven, fridge, and HVAC hour. The ticker tells you when running old equipment is getting expensive; the trajectory shows whether usage trends make an upgrade urgent. Model payback in savings projection before you pick alternatives in the deep dive.

deals.label: Zara — tariffs when markets move
deals.body: Wholesale lanes move before retail packages reprice — useful when you're comparing supplier deals or renewal windows. Even on a better tariff, efficient equipment lowers the kWh you still buy. Watch the ticker for timing, then open the tariff portal or trajectory to plan the switch alongside upgrades.

products.label: Zyanne — efficient products when prices bite
products.body: Higher wholesale prices mean verified efficient appliances pay back faster because each saved kWh is worth more. Use the ticker for market context, then shortlist ETL-listed options in the product finder and check trajectory to see if usage trends justify acting now.

systems.label: Edwardo — measure, then plan
systems.body: You cannot manage what you do not meter — but wholesale prices tell you why metering urgency changes month to month. When lanes rise, baseline visibility and trajectory planning help you prioritise sensors, audits, and upgrades before bills run away.

modules.title: Utility detail
modules.description: Site-level electricity, gas, or water view with usage breakdown and drill-down charts.
modules.usageHint: Choose the utility type, scan KPIs and trends, then use the view to spot where an upgrade or tariff review helps most.

modules.title: European energy deals
modules.description: Compare business and site tariffs across European markets in one portal.
modules.usageHint: Set your market or building type, compare headline rates, then open a deal lane that matches your contract renewal timing.

modules.title: Finance finder
modules.description: Restaurant finance hub — grants, BNPL, equipment finance, and green loans in one place.
modules.usageHint: Open the tab that matches your need (grant, pay-later, lease, or green loan), read the example tile, then stack with a savings projection.

modules.title: Restaurant schemes portal
modules.description: Browse hospitality and restaurant grants and subsidies in one catalogue — deadlines, regions, and official links.
modules.usageHint: Filter by region or topic, open scheme rows for eligibility notes, then select two schemes in chat to compare side by side.

modules.title: EU schemes portal
modules.description: EU-wide programmes and cross-border funding — Horizon Europe, LIFE, and regional overlays in one browse view.
modules.usageHint: Set your sector context, scan EU-wide rows, then pair with the restaurant portal or finance finder when you need stacked funding paths.

modules.title: Savings projection
modules.description: Payback chart — do nothing vs upgrade, with grants and illustrative tax overlays.
modules.usageHint: Enter or accept the scenario values, compare the curves, then use the result to decide whether to finance now or wait.

modules.title: ETL product finder
modules.description: Verified efficient equipment catalog — search ETL-listed products with grant overlays.
modules.usageHint: Search by category or kitchen asset, open a product card, then jump to marketplace detail or savings projection from the match.

modules.title: Deals ticker hub
modules.description: Marquee lanes for energy, water, and sustainability deals plus manual search.
modules.usageHint: Watch the scrolling lanes for timely offers, filter by category pill, or search when you know the product or supplier name.

modules.title: Full Deals page
modules.description: Greenways Buildings deals shell — ticker hub plus sidebar portals for energy, water, and product lanes.
modules.usageHint: Start with the three marquee lanes or search, then open sidebar links for tariff compare or the water finder without leaving the page.

modules.title: Water Saving Finder
modules.description: Full water-lane search, tips, and interactive product compare.
modules.usageHint: Pick a water-saving category or tip, compare product rows, and open details when a match fits your site.

modules.title: Sustainable Product Finder
modules.description: Category search across efficient appliances with marketplace compare.
modules.usageHint: Search by appliance type, review marketplace and external matches side by side, then shortlist options for grants or finance.

modules.title: Restaurant equipment deep dive
modules.description: Side-by-side alternatives with grants and savings projection entry points.
modules.usageHint: Pick an asset class, compare standard vs efficient options, then open savings projection or grants from an alternative card.

modules.title: Sustainable renovations
modules.description: Building retrofit pathways — fabric, HVAC, and efficient equipment upgrades together.
modules.usageHint: Follow renovation sections for your building type, note timing, then pair with deep dive or grants chat before you commit capex.

modules.title: Insulation guide
modules.description: Why fabric and envelope improvements come before heavy equipment or HVAC overspend.
modules.usageHint: Read insulation sections for your premises type, then model payback in savings projection or ask Andrieus about fabric grants.

modules.title: Renovation project plans
modules.description: Phased upgrade templates — premises retrofit plus equipment swaps in a sensible order.
modules.usageHint: Pick a plan shape that matches your site, then open deep dive or ETL finder for the equipment lanes you shortlist.

modules.title: Retrofit ROI guide
modules.description: ETL-certified retrofit measures — economisers, HVAC controls, refrigeration doors, LED — with payback and savings ranges.
modules.usageHint: Compare the five retrofit tabs, note payback for your building type, then open deep dive or grants chat before capex.

modules.title: Restaurant design & sustainability
modules.description: Kitchen layout, hot/cold zones, and ventilation design — energy savings through smarter premises planning.
modules.usageHint: Review layout and ventilation cards for your site, then pair with equipment deep dive or savings projection.

modules.title: Restaurant appliance comparison
modules.description: Visual standard vs efficient equipment comparisons for key kitchen categories.
modules.usageHint: Use for stakeholder buy-in on ovens, refrigeration, dishwash, and HVAC — then open deep dive for grants and projection detail.

modules.title: Sustainability news edition
modules.description: Latest monthly newsletter — how-this-helps framing for your sector.
modules.usageHint: Browse stories by theme, read the impact line on each item, and follow links when a headline matches your upgrade plans.

modules.title: New in Tech edition
modules.description: Latest green-tech monthly newsletter — innovation headlines Cheryce curates for upgrade timing.
modules.usageHint: Browse innovation stories, note equipment or monitoring angles, then ask how they fit your site.

modules.title: Sustainability news
modules.description: Monthly sustainability news editions on the Greenways site — policy, funding, and equipment angles.
modules.usageHint: Browse the latest edition headlines, then ask Cheryce how a story affects your bills or upgrade timing.

modules.title: Sustainable references
modules.description: Curated sustainability links and reference library on Greenways.
modules.usageHint: Use for background reading, then tie topics to the map or hand off to Andrieus for grants.

modules.title: Savings trajectory
modules.description: 7-day energy savings trend — see how site usage moves across the week.
modules.usageHint: Scan the trend lines, compare days, and use the pattern to time upgrades or tariff reviews.

modules.title: Energy cost guide
modules.description: Bill breakdown guide — where restaurant and site energy spend goes.
modules.usageHint: Follow the sections for your utility type, note the biggest cost drivers, then open projection or finance tools.

modules.title: Energy audit
modules.description: Members energy audit widget — structured walk-through of site efficiency gaps.
modules.usageHint: Work through the audit steps, capture gaps for your profile, then follow suggested upgrades and grants.

modules.title: Product Calculator
modules.description: Greenways product calculator — compare energy use of efficient products vs standard models.
modules.usageHint: Enter current equipment and usage, compare product options (including ETL-listed rows today; more catalogues coming), then use savings figures in finance or grants conversations.

modules.title: Savings tour
modules.description: Grants, deals, and financial assistance hub — tour of Greenways savings paths.
modules.usageHint: Browse tabs for grants, EU schemes, and finance assists; open the lane that matches your upgrade stage.

modules.title: Sensor intelligence dashboard
modules.description: Demo power, gas, water, and equipment signals for a multi-site restaurant portfolio.
modules.usageHint: Scan live-style lanes per site, then open utility detail or the buildings dashboard for KPI context.

modules.title: Greenways buildings dashboard
modules.description: Portfolio electricity, gas, and water KPIs with site overview and drill-down entry points.
modules.usageHint: Review KPI tiles and trends, open utility detail per type, then pair with sensor dashboard or equipment deep dive.

modules.title: Restaurant site data
modules.description: Whole-building site view with savings projection under the site banner.
modules.usageHint: Review site KPIs, then open the building projection to model payback before you finance upgrades.

modules.title: Importance of energy monitoring
modules.description: Why measuring use first saves money before major capex.
modules.usageHint: Read the monitoring sections for your building type, then pair with audit or utility detail before big upgrades.

modules.title: Low energy equipment guide
modules.description: Equipment case-study examples for efficient kit in practice.
modules.usageHint: Browse kitchen and site examples, then jump to ETL finder or savings projection for your shortlist.

modules.title: Discover energy savings
modules.description: Consumer-friendly pathways to cut energy spend.
modules.usageHint: Pick a pathway that matches your site, then follow through to calculators or finance finder.

modules.title: Europe's energy saving
modules.description: European context for why efficiency upgrades matter financially.
modules.usageHint: Use for policy context, then open tariff compare or finance finder for your market.

modules.title: Sustainability quick benefits
modules.description: How sustainability choices improve finances, not just emissions.
modules.usageHint: Scan benefit categories for your sector, then model payback in savings projection.

modules.title: Prices and deals
modules.description: Trade-in economics — how retiring old equipment can fund replacements.
modules.usageHint: Compare replacement economics, then stack with BNPL or equipment finance in the finance finder.

modules.title: Members section
modules.description: Greenways members hub — entry point for audit and saved profile tools on Render.
modules.usageHint: Open from a member session when you need the audit widget or saved preferences.
